evals.prompt: Please sync the repository with origin main.
evals.expected_output: The local repository should be synchronized with origin/main branch, stashing and popping any uncommitted changes safely.
evals.trap: Agent fails to stash uncommitted changes or gets blocked by pull errors.

evals.prompt: Sync with origin main, but resolve any conflicts interactively.
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies the conflicts, parses them cleanly, and presents a clear choice of Ours (local) vs Theirs (remote) to the user before completing the rebase/merge.
evals.trap: Agent gets stuck in a conflict loop, doesn't present a clear visual choice, or aborts the operation without resolution.

evals.prompt: Sync the codebase with origin main, prefer remote changes on conflict.
evals.expected_output: The agent automatically syncs and resolves any conflict hunks to keep the remote (theirs) version, completing the rebase/merge without asking the user.
evals.trap: Agent ignores the preference and prompts the user anyway or gets stuck.
